Explicitly defined in the task description and dynamically created via setup_task.sh.
A 20MB mathematical threshold to reliably confirm the exclusion of the 50MB synthetic file (huge-video.mkv) generated during task setup.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data; setup_task.sh dynamically creates a 50MB uncompressible dummy file in the 'temp-video-renders' directory. The agent must configure an automated backup with a 'daily' schedule, a retention policy of '4', and explicitly exclude the 'temp-video-renders' folder. The maximum allowable backup size constraint of 20MB (20971520 bytes) acts as an empirical check to confirm that the 50MB dummy directory was properly excluded.
